allow: PowerShell($src="P:\\PI_Tech\\AI\\PI-NewWebsite-SRC-08"; $dst="P:\\PI_Tech\\AI\\Claude AI\\files\\pi-techniques\\pi-techniques\\public"; robocopy "$src\\css" "$dst\\css" /E /NFL /NDL /NJH /NJS /NP | Out-Null; robocopy "$src\\js" "$dst\\js" /E /NFL /NDL /NJH /NJS /NP | Out-Null; robocopy "$src\\webfonts" "$dst\\webfonts" /E /NFL /NDL /NJH /NJS /NP | Out-Null; Write-Output "css/js/webfonts copied"; \(Get-ChildItem "$dst\\css" -File\).Count; \(Get-ChildItem "$dst\\js" -File\).Count)

PowerShell($enc=New-Object System.Text.UTF8Encoding\($false\); foreach\($f in @\("style.min.css","responsive.min.css"\)\){ $p="P:\\PI_Tech\\AI\\Claude AI\\files\\pi-techniques\\pi-techniques\\public\\css\\$f"; $raw=[System.IO.File]::ReadAllText\($p\); $new=$raw.Replace\(' a.Arrow_UI',' .Arrow_UI'\); [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText\($p,$new,$enc\); $c=\([regex]::Matches\($new,'a\\.Arrow_UI'\)\).Count; Write-Output "$f -> remaining a.Arrow_UI: $c" })

PowerShell($conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.LocalPort -in 3000,3001,3002 }; if \($conns\) { $conns | Select-Object LocalAddress,LocalPort,OwningProcess | Format-Table -AutoSize | Out-String } else { "no dev server on 3000-3002" })

PowerShell($app="P:\\PI_Tech\\AI\\Claude AI\\files\\pi-techniques\\pi-techniques\\src\\app"; $site="$app\\\(site\)"; $f="$app\\\(faithful\)"; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $f | Out-Null; foreach\($m in "services","careers","case-studies"\){ if\(Test-Path "$site\\$m"\){ Move-Item "$site\\$m" "$f\\$m" -Force } }; foreach\($s in "$f\\careers\\[slug]","$f\\case-studies\\[slug]"\){ if\(Test-Path $s\){ Remove-Item $s -Recurse -Force } }; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path "$f\\career-details" | Out-Null; Write-Output "=== \(faithful\) ==="; Get-ChildItem $f -Recurse -Name; Write-Output "=== \(site\) ==="; Get-ChildItem $site -Name)

PowerShell(Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "Name='node.exe'" | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -match 'next' -or $_.CommandLine -match 'pi-techniques' } | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.ProcessId -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; \(Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object\).Count)
